hooks.command: MODIFIED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' | grep -vE '^(README|CHANGELOG|ROADMAP|CLAUDE)\.md$' || true); has_match() { echo "$MODIFIED" | grep -qE "$1" 2>/dev/null; }; PARTS=""; if has_match '^src/' || has_match '^vite\.config\.'; then PARTS='Source code changed — consider updating README.md and/or CHANGELOG.md.'; fi; if has_match '^\.github/'; then PARTS="${PARTS:+$PARTS }CI changed — consider updating CLAUDE.md and/or README.md."; fi; if has_match '^package\.json$' || has_match '^public/manifest\.json$'; then PARTS="${PARTS:+$PARTS }Version or config changed — consider updating CHANGELOG.md."; fi; if [ -n "$PARTS" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage": "📋 Doc reminder: %s"}' "$PARTS"; fi
